case_title: DALE ANTHONY AGUIRRE VS. CHING LI WONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY AGUIRRE, DALE ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, CHING LI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $271.70 SERVED AUG-24-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, CHING LI
STIPULATION TO USE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY AGUIRRE, DALE ANTHONY WONG, CHING LI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DALE ANTHONY AGUIRRE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHING LI WONHG IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUIRRE, DALE ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG, CHING LI DEFENDANT MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF TO SHOW JUSTIFICATION FOR WITHOLDING THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN TO RECOVER OTHER DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUIRRE, DALE ANTHONY HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON MOTION TO VACATE IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-19-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR BY JUDGE MURLENE RANDLE. CASE TO BE FILED IN PROPER COURT (APPPEALS). APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DALE ANTHONY AGUIRRE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHING LI WONG IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
